**[Alpine skiing](/wiki/Para-alpine_skiing "Para-alpine skiing") at the [2014 Winter Paralympics](/wiki/2014_Winter_Paralympics "2014 Winter Paralympics")** was held at the [Rosa Khutor Alpine Resort](/wiki/Rosa_Khutor_Alpine_Resort "Rosa Khutor Alpine Resort") near [Krasnaya Polyana](/wiki/Krasnaya_Polyana,_Sochi,_Krasnodar_Krai "Krasnaya Polyana, Sochi, Krasnodar Krai"), [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia"). The thirty-two events occurred on 8–16 March 2014.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Events

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alpine_skiing_at_the_2014_Winter_Paralympics&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Events")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d9/Rosa_Khutor.jpg/330px-Rosa_Khutor.jpg)](/wiki/File:Rosa_Khutor.jpg)

Rosa Khutor Alpine Resort, the venue for Alpine Skiing

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b5/Super_giant_slalom_event_at_the_Rosa_Khutor_Alpine_Ski_Resort.jpg/330px-Super_giant_slalom_event_at_the_Rosa_Khutor_Alpine_Ski_Resort.jpg)](/wiki/File:Super_giant_slalom_event_at_the_Rosa_Khutor_Alpine_Ski_Resort.jpg)

Finish area

Snowboarding made its Paralympic debut, with the addition of men's and women's standing snowboard cross events to the alpine skiing program.

The competition events are:

* [Downhill](/wiki/Downhill_(ski_competition) "Downhill (ski competition)") (sitting, standing, visually impaired): [women](/wiki/Alpine_skiing_at_the_2014_Winter_Paralympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_downhill "Alpine skiing at the 2014 Winter Paralympics – Women's downhill") – [men](/wiki/Alpine_skiing_at_the_2014_Winter_Paralympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_downhill "Alpine skiing at the 2014 Winter Paralympics – Men's downhill")
